name: Grape wine (food medium)
description: Food-derived medium: metabolizable components of Grape wine [Beverages] from FooDB, plus a standard M9 mineral base. Organic components use presence-based uptake bounds; FooDB content retained. Measured compounds with no BiGG exchange are listed under uncovered.

provenance.citation: FooDB v2020-04-07 (Wishart DS et al., foodb.ca). Content sources: 22397579, 22397579; USDA (con), 22397579; USDA(con), DTU, MANUAL, Ough, CS. (1984) Volatile nitrogen compounds in fermented beverages. In: Nykänen, L. & Lehtonen, P., eds, Flavour Research of Alcoholic Beverages, Vol. 3, Instrumental and Sensory Analysis, Helsinki, Foundation for Biotechnical and Industrial Fermentation Research, pp. 199-225, PHENOL EXPLORER, USDA.
provenance.notes: Organic components mapped from FooDB compounds to BiGG via InChIKey/name. Mineral base added. Bounds presence-based; foodb_content retained. Unmapped measured compounds kept in uncovered (v2 completeness fix). IMPORTANT: composition values are taken from the archived FooDB 2020-04-07 CSV data release; FooDB's live food page no longer displays this bulk composition, so it will appear empty. Verify individual compounds via the per-component cross-reference links. Underlying content was aggregated by FooDB from USDA / DTU / Phenol Explorer.
